name: mirante
description: A glanceable macOS menu bar overview of every active Claude CLI session: live status, task-progress %, and a plain-language recap.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/collect/hooks && cp src/collect/hooks/mirante-hook.sh dist/collect/hooks/mirante-hook.sh && cp src/notify/focus-terminal.sh dist/notify/focus-terminal.sh
